JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-01-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514, THOMAS J. MELLON, JR. FOR A PROVE-UP HEARING.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 514

CASE ASSIGNED FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP. JUDGE: THOMAS J. MELLON, JR.; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: LINDA CHAVEZ; BAILIFF: W. WEATHERLY. PLAINTIFF CATHERINA LEUNG APPEARS WITH COUNSEL, SUSAN PARKINSON. PLAINTIFF IS SWORN AND TESTIFIES IN HER OWN BEHALF. EXHIBIT #1: LEASE AGREEMENT - IN EVIDENCE; EXHIBIT #2: 3-DAY NOTICE - IN EVIDENCE. THE COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF. JUDGMENT SIGNED, FILED AND SCANNED THIS DATE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, CATHERINA AKA CATHY LEUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROUGHTON, LAUREN BAKER, SAMSON $7,896.26 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,396.26, PLUS COSTS AS SUBSEQUENTLY AWARDED. SEE SCANNED DOC. THE PREMISES ARE RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF AND THE LEASE IS FORFEITED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

Plaintiff Catherina Leung appears with counsel, Susan Parkinson. Plaintiff is sworn and testifies in her own behalf. Exhibit #1: Lease Agreement - IN EVIDENCE; Exhibit #2: 3-day Notice - IN EVIDENCE.
